name: Jimeng AI MCP Server
what_it_does: MCP server for Jimeng (即梦) — ByteDance's AI creative content platform offering AI image and video generation. Enables AI agents to generate images, create AI videos, and access ByteDance's creative AI capabilities through the Jimeng API — integrating generative media production into AI workflows.
use_cases: Generating AI images from text prompts via ByteDance Jimeng from creative agents
Creating AI videos using Jimeng's generation capabilities from content production agents
Automating creative content generation with ByteDance AI from marketing agents
Integrating AI-generated imagery into CN-market content workflows
not_for: Teams outside China without Jimeng API access
Non-CN market creative workflows (use Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion MCPs)
Commercial use without proper ByteDance/Jimeng licensing
best_when: A Chinese market content team wants AI agents to generate images or videos using ByteDance's Jimeng AI platform — integrating generative media into CN-focused creative workflows.
avoid_when: You operate outside China or don't have Jimeng API access. Community tool — not official ByteDance SDK. Data processed by ByteDance in CN.

auth.notes: Jimeng API credentials required. Access via Jimeng/CapCut developer program.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Jimeng provides limited free generation credits
pricing.paid_tiers: Jimeng API usage-based pricing per generation
pricing.notes: Jimeng API credits required. MCP server is free open source community tool.

known_agent_gotchas: CN data residency — generated images processed and stored by ByteDance infrastructure
Video generation can be very slow — implement generous timeouts (30s+)
Community tool — not official ByteDance SDK, may break when Jimeng API changes
Generated content subject to Jimeng's content policy — review before commercial use
agent_readiness.security_notes: CN data residency via ByteDance. API key auth. Content generated via ByteDance AI — review IP rights and content policies for commercial use.

security_score_components.security_notes: CN data residency. ByteDance infrastructure. API key. Review IP rights for generated content.
